Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1800 "FANTASYWORLDDIZZY-7F40-0797-1800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7f40 jsr $0797 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fantasy World Dizzy.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The call to $7F40 displays the loading screen, which includes the outer frame of the gameplay area. Added another routine at $0792 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
